title: mentha × rotundifolia subsp. alopecuroides
intro: Mentha × rotundifolia subsp. alopecuroides, commonly known as pineapple mint, is a hybrid plant belonging to the mint family, characterized by its distinctive pineapple-like fragrance and flavor. The medicinal properties of pineapple mint include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of pineapple mint include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve nausea and headaches, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as colds and flu. Pineapple mint can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
